notes: All 15 responses (3 temps x 5 reps) are highly accurate and consistent — every response correctly identifies all 6 components, their shapes/colors, the HTTPS and gRPC protocol labels, and the unlabeled DB connections. No hallucinations in any response. The sole universal miss is the dangling/phantom third gRPC line from the API Gateway noted in the ground truth; no response caught it (and none fabricated it either). Top-ranked reps (t0.1/rep3, t0.4/rep2, t0.7/rep0) earned slight edge for carefully noting the gRPC label placement nuance on the two parallel arrows. Temperature had no observable effect on accuracy.
